title: 3 Facts About Saturn

segments.text: Saturn is so light that it would actually float in water.
And its rings hide something strange.
Saturn's rings are made of billions of pieces of ice and rock.
Deep inside the planet, scientists think it actually rains diamonds.
And one single year on Saturn lasts about twenty nine Earth years.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Saturn would float in water and it rains diamonds inside it. Space is wild. Follow for daily facts!
